tasks.title: P00 continuity setup
tasks.notes: Initialize the durable sequential workspace and cross-platform handoff artifacts.

tasks.title: E01 sub-quadratic stats correlation
tasks.notes: Preserve correlation semantics while replacing full model-group rescans with bounded timestamp-window lookup.

tasks.title: E02 bounded pure-vector fallback memory
tasks.notes: Bound search() vector-fallback memory: stream metadata/vectors, keep only top_k in a heap, fetch text only for winners; preserve ranking and deterministic ties.

tasks.title: E03 scalable JSONL reporting
tasks.notes: Backward-read newest N rows from EOF in load_events; thread-safe single-write append_event (proxy.py runs ThreadingHTTPServer).

tasks.title: E04 streaming CSV sampling
tasks.notes: Stream parse_csv rows instead of materializing the full table; keep first-20 sample + incremental count.

tasks.title: E05 stream scanning and re-embedding
tasks.notes: scan_files as iterator; fetchmany/executemany batched re-embed on backend mismatch; per-file savepoint protection + failure reporting.
